text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Derby draws closer. One night,<n>after another
hard session of diligent<n>training...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: AIIIIIEEE!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Is that the cry of a demon-possessed<n>pigeon? No,
it's Matikanefukukitaru! I<n>rush to the classroom to
find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! I-I-I-I saw it! I-it's right<n>over there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Worse! Have a look, if you dare! Right<n>there on the
wall, in the list of Derby<n>entrants!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A name I never thought I'd see...Look, it says... Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aiiieee! Her name is so bright my<n>eyes can hardly
take it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: R-right... Sorry. I was just so<n>surprised.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's pray together! As I am, I<n>don't have
the confidence to race<n>against the likes of Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O gods, hear my supplication! Grant<n>me a divine
shield against Suzuka's<n>piercing light!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Such tremendous power may wreak<n>terrible
curses. So, I beg of you—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What are you praying for, Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? I'm praying not to<n>be consumed
by your all-powerful—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aiiieee! Suzuka?! What are you doing<n>here?! Have
you come to vanquish<n>me once and for all?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm only here to pray, just like<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to do my best in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You want to... do your best? But why<n>would
someone like you need to pray<n>for something like
that?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think we all feel the same way in the<n>run-up to
the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We don't want this monster of a race<n>to get the
better of us... It's that<n>intimidating.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You know, it's just like when your<n>rival suddenly
starts to look<n>unbeatable. But there's no reason to
panic.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's only natural to be scared.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Being scared is... natural?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, if even someone like you can<n>get scared...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense why I'd be terrified.<n>For some
reason, I feel a little better<n>hearing that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thanks a lot, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm just happy to see that you're<n>feeling better.
choice_data_list: Why don't you both pray for victory together?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Together? Yeah, good idea! Thank<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well Suzuka, since we're both here,<n>we may as
well pray together!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After they finish their prayers, Silence<n>Suzuka
takes her leave.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew! All's well that ends well.<n>That's quite a
weight off my sh—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Oh, no! Since we prayed<n>together, doesn't
that mean Suzuka<n>will get the same amount of
luck as<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If she has the same great blessing as<n>me, then
her natural ability will surely<n>seal her victory!
choice_data_list: Oh no! What should we do?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We've got no choice but to ask for<n>divine
intervention!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O gods, hear me! Grant me the<n>greatest, best,
most supremely<n>sublime blessing that Umakind
has<n>known or will ever know!
